<!-- Auto-generated from assistant_api/app/documents/visual/*.md. -->

# Visual Guide Topic Registry

This registry tracks the generated visual-guide topics available to the bot. Each row maps a topical Markdown guide to its source PDF and frontend-served image asset.

**Current coverage:** 281 topical guides. Every guide has at least one Markdown image link, and images live in `ChatWA/wwwroot/images/`.

**Naming conventions:** guide filenames, YAML `topic:` values, and image filenames are prefixed with the source PDF slug so content from different PDFs cannot overwrite each other. Markdown image links must use `images/<filename>` with no leading slash.

## Topic Index

## Maintenance Notes

1. When adding a manual visual guide, save the screenshot in `ChatWA/wwwroot/images/` and reference it as `images/<filename>`.
2. When regenerating guides from PDFs, run `pdf_to_markdown.py` first so page screenshots are extracted with source-prefixed filenames, then run `scripts/generate_topical_guides.py`.
3. After adding or editing visual guides, re-ingest the backend knowledge base before testing in chat.
4. Van should flag duplicate-looking topics during QA instead of deleting them directly; the source PDFs are treated as genuinely different until reviewed.
